intent: Final retest of F-IC1 correction propagation at N=975 (target was N=1000, 97.5% reached). Determine if stable equilibrium holds; if so, mark F-IC1 RESOLVED.
expect: FP 0% maintained; correction rate >=66% (plateau); uncorrected <=20; HIGH=0; content-dependent=0. If all met, F-IC1 qualifies for resolution.

actual.residuals_analysis: 16 uncorrected: 6 from L-025 (structural/citation-only), 4 from L-050 (structural/citation-only), 3 from L-457 (structural/citation-only), 3 from L-734 (citation-only). Zero content-dependent propagation detected.

diff: Expected stable plateau >=66%. Actual 68% (improved +2pp from S442). Uncorrected: 15->16 (+1 over 22 lessons — 0.045/lesson growth rate, decelerating). HIGH: 0 (maintained). Content-dependent: 0 (maintained). FP: 0% (maintained). All resolution criteria met at N=975 (97.5% of N=1000 target). Pattern: self-correcting system, rate improves without intervention.
resolution: F-IC1 RESOLVED. Correction propagation defense is structurally stable at scale. 5-pattern contamination framework operational. Key finding: 34% residual plateau is safe (citation-only/structural anchors, zero false-claim forward propagation). L-025 chain grew 17->25 citers but rate improved 65%->76% naturally. Plateau represents equilibrium, not degradation.
